title: hCaptcha
excerpt: description: Validate hCaptcha tokens in Pages Functions using the hCaptcha Pages Plugin. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. The hCaptcha Pages Plugin validates hCaptcha tokens. yarn add @cloudflare/pages-plugin-hcaptcha
